title: Hierarchical names in genblk may conflict with existing identifiers

features.name: escaped_identifier_conflicts_with_genblk_hierarchical_name
features.description: Code should include an escaped identifier declaration that matches the hierarchical path pattern used by Yosys for generate block internal names

features.name: generate_block_with_local_wire_conflicting_with_escaped_identifier
features.description: Code should include a generate if block containing a wire declaration whose name, when combined with the generate block's hierarchy, matches an existing escaped identifier
